race.description: First National King & Heath Maiden Plate
race.comment: Good race with plenty of speed. MAINMANKASH (1) has led and found one better each time, the latest fresh at Sale. Fitter and expected to go close again. SAPPHIRE REIGN (10) is fitter for two runs back and looks close to a win. Has good enough speed to box seat on this and should be tough to stop. ZANE ZENA (8) is a four-year-old mare making debut by Ilovethiscity out of Laynlow. From a big family of winners. Won a Flemington jump-out on February 27. Looks a capable type and will be competitive. ROCK GLORY (7) is another speed galloper and has the blinkers added for this. Can give a sight. ZOUIE (11) returns from a break. Has shown some ability and worth including.
